creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-07-29 13:17:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/opentracker      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net/opentracker/files opentracker.in patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  opentracker is a open and free bittorrent tracker project.
  It aims for minimal resource usage and is intended to run
  at your wlan router. Currently it is deployed as an open and
  free tracker instance.
  
  WWW: http://erdgeist.org/arts/software/opentracker/
  
  PR:             ports/137130
  Submitted by:   utisoft at gmail.com
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2127    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +62 -0     ports/net/opentracker/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/opentracker/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/net/opentracker/files/opentracker.in (new)
  1.1       +58 -0     ports/net/opentracker/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net/opentracker/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/net/opentracker/pkg-plist (new)
